title: Function Composition and Inverse Relationships
description: A visual flowchart demonstrating the composition of two functions and the relationship with their inverses, showing how applying a function and its inverse returns to the original input.
relationships: f maps elements from A to B
g maps elements from B to C
g∘f maps elements directly from A to C
f⁻¹ reverses the mapping of f
g⁻¹ reverses the mapping of g
f⁻¹∘g⁻¹ reverses the composite function g∘f
